data: {"generalSituation":"A fresh to strong easterly airstream will continue to affect the coastal areas of Guangdong tomorrow. Meanwhile, a band of clouds will cover Guangdong. Under the influence of the northeast monsoon, the weather will be slightly cooler over Guangdong on Tuesday. The dry monsoon is expected to persistently bring generally fine weather to southern China in the middle and latter parts of this week to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260309","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"East to northeast force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
